name: @miaoying-ai/miaoying-cli
description: 秒应 CLI 工具 - 创建统计、投票、预约、考试、查查并导出数据

scripts.pack: cd .. && zip -r miaoying-cli-$npm_package_version.zip miaoying -x 'miaoying/node_modules/*' -x 'miaoying/package-lock.json' -x 'miaoying/README.md' -x 'miaoying/LICENSE' -x 'miaoying/.git/*' -x 'miaoying/.gitignore' -x 'miaoying/.DS_Store' -x 'miaoying/*.zip' && echo "✓ 打包完成: miaoying-cli-$npm_package_version.zip"

author: 积致科技（北京）有限公司
